response.justification: While Bogdan possesses over 15 years of software engineering experience and a strong full-stack background at top-tier companies like Google and Meta, he does not align with the Director-level seniority and deep AI focus required for this role. His AI experience is limited to a very recent stint, and he lacks the recognized AI expertise, advanced AI degree, and strategic customer advisory experience expected of a Principal Engineer driving enterprise AI Strategy.
strengths: Meets the minimum requirement of 15 years of software engineering experience.
Strong full-stack and cloud engineering background at leading tech companies (Google, Meta).
Demonstrated entrepreneurial drive through open-source projects and platform development.
concerns: Lacks recognized, long-term expertise and advanced academic credentials in Artificial Intelligence.
Currently operating at a Staff level, which falls short of the expected Director-level Principal seniority.
Missing evidence of advising strategic enterprise customers on AI and cloud platform adoption.
